case_title: CCSF,OFC.OF TREAS&TAXCOLLECTOR/ATT:WAH-MEI LEW,BDR VS BECERRA, GABINO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF,OFC.OF TREAS&TAXCOLLECTOR/ATT:WAH-MEI LEW,BDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECERRA, GABINO $5,005.87 PRINCIPAL, $4,778.20 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,784.07
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,778.20 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, GABINO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF,OFC.OF TREAS&TAXCOLLECTOR/ATT:WAH-MEI LEW,BDR AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, GABINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, GABINO

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-13-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLTF IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT FOR $5000. PAYMENT PLAN BELOW. CASE CONTINUED 6 MONTHS FOR STATUS REPORT. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IF PAID IN FULL BY DEFT.
* PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50/MO. BEGINNING 4/28/04 & ON THE 28TH DAY OF EACH MO. THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS -
- MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF,OFC.OF TREAS&TAXCOLLECTOR/ATT:WAH-MEI LEW,BDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECERRA, GABINO $4,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,005.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
